description: **WorkSource Cobb** is a free career resource for Cobb County residents looking for work or looking to level up. They offer job matching, resume help, and career coaching at no cost. Worth a stop if you or someone you know is in job-search mode.

**Cobb County Sheriff's Office** is currently hiring. Open positions are posted on their careers page and cover a range of roles across the department. Worth checking if you're interested in public service work close to home.

**Cobb County** posts its open government positions through their careers portal and roles turn over regularly across departments. If you've ever thought about working for the county, their listings are worth a look.

**Cobb County School District** is hiring across a range of positions. Whether you're a teacher, paraprofessional, bus driver, or just looking for school-year hours, their employment page is a good first stop.

scraped_snippet: YMCA careers Atlanta offer rewarding roles to impact your community. Apply now to make a difference!
description: **Atlanta YMCA** has openings across its locations, including spots right here in East Cobb. If you're looking for work that actually feels like it matters to the community, their careers page is worth a browse.

scraped_snippet: Explore exciting job opportunities at Avenue East Cobb. Join our team and be part of a thriving retail and dining hub!
description: **Avenue East Cobb** is hiring across its mix of retail and dining tenants. If you want to work somewhere walkable and close to home, their job listings are a good place to start.

scraped_snippet: JOB POSTING: BUSCAMOS CUIDADORES (CNA/PCA) BILINGUES EN STONE MOUNTAIN, GA – MEDIO TIEMPO (TURNO DIURNO) - CONTRATACIÓN INMEDIATA - HORARIO: FINES DE SEMANA. Employer: Caring Hands United, Inc.. Location: Pine Lake, DeKalb County. Salary: $41,119/yr (estimated). Details: ¿Estás buscando una carrera gratificante donde puedas marcar la diferencia en la vida de otras personas?. Si es así, una carrera como cuidador(a) de atención en el hogar puede ser perfecta para ti. Estamos buscando personas motivadas y compasivas, con ganas de aprender y crecer en este campo tan gratificante, para trabajar con clientes en el área de Alpharetta, Georgia. Como cuidador(a) de atención en el hogar, brindarás servicios esenciales para ayudar a personas mayores y personas con discapa…
description: **Caring Hands United** is looking for bilingual (Spanish-English) CNAs and PCAs for part-time weekend daytime shifts in the Stone Mountain and Alpharetta areas. The work involves in-home care for seniors and individuals with disabilities. Good fit for a compassionate caregiver who wants weekend-only hours and can serve Spanish-speaking clients.

scraped_snippet: JOB POSTING: PT Hairstylist/Barber. Employer: Southeast Clips. Location: Doraville, DeKalb County. Salary: $106,230/yr (estimated). Details: Full or Part-time hair stylist. Something that makes us a little different is that we strive to have the highest " effective wage " in the market (base wage  productivity  product commissions  tips). Last week the average effective wage of our staff was $31.26/hr.* Some make a little less, some make substantially more. It all just depends on how proficient you are, but no one i…
description: **Southeast Clips** (Great Clips' largest franchisee in the country) is hiring full and part-time hair stylists in Doraville, with flexible hours and an established customer base. The snippet notes last week's average effective wage across staff was $31.26 per hour, factoring in base pay, productivity, product commissions, and tips. High-volume shop with upside based on how fast you are.

Details: Job Description Job Description The Construction Estimator will play a key role in supporting a commercial masonry contractor based in the Atlanta area. This position focuses on accurately estimating costs and preparing bids primarily for commercial buildings and industrial facilities. The estimator collaborates closely with project teams to manage budgets and perform material takeoffs to ensure competitive and comprehensive bidding. Responsibilities Prepare detailed cost estimates for commerci…
description: **Construction Estimator at Bibler Masonry Contractors, Inc.** in Roswell. The role focuses on estimating costs and preparing bids for commercial and industrial masonry projects, working closely with project teams on material takeoffs and budget management. A good fit for someone with commercial construction estimating experience looking to plant roots with an established Atlanta-area contractor.

description: **Medical Assistant at Milner Vein and Vascular LLC** in Tucker. The full-time role covers back-office duties including collecting patient history, vitals, and medications and documenting everything in the chart. They're specifically looking for bilingual candidates and someone who's a fast learner with a focus on patient experience.

The seminary is a graduate-level theological institution focused on academic excellence and ministry preparation, and this is a senior-level higher ed role. Worth a look if you have a background in institutional research or accreditation work in an academic setting.
